appearance.unknown_name: an elderly man in ornate robes
appearance.full_name: Eldric the Arcane, Master of the Guild
appearance.description: An elderly man with a long white beard and piercing blue eyes. He wears ornate blue robes embroidered with silver runes, and carries an ornate staff that glows with arcane energy.

facts: I am Eldric, master of the arcane arts. I can teach you the fundamentals of magic.
Arcane magic requires focus - a staff or wand - and runestones to channel power.
Staves amplify spell damage, while wands reduce cooldowns. Choose your path wisely.
Each technique requires dedication. Come to me when you are ready to begin your training.
Magic Missile is your first spell - a reliable bolt of arcane energy.
Mana Shield provides protection by creating a barrier of pure magic.
Arcane Sight reveals hidden auras and enhances your perception.
Teleport allows instant movement, but requires precise control.

conversation.first_greeting: The archmage smiles warmly, his staff glowing with soft blue light. 'Ah, a seeker of arcane knowledge. I am Eldric the Arcane, master of this tower. What brings you here?'
conversation.greeting: Eldric smiles warmly, his staff glowing with soft blue light. 'Ah, a seeker of arcane knowledge. I am Eldric. What brings you to the church?'
conversation.farewell: He nods thoughtfully. 'May your studies be fruitful, and your runestones plentiful.'
